'''chatobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nycthemere|nycthemere]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nycthemere|nycthemere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chatobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || chætebeth || chætebej || chætebesh || chætebe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || chatotoboth || chatotoboj || chatotobosh || chatotobo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || chatoboth || chatoboj || chatobosh || chatobo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || chatofbofth || chatofbofj || chatofbofsh || chatofbof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chatobotho || chatobojo || chatobosho || chatoboko
|-
| [[Patient]] || chatoboth || chatoboj || chatobosh || chatobo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chatobothol || chatobojol || chatoboshol || chatobokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chatoboothotho || chatoboojojo || chatobooshosho || chatobooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || chatobothon || chatobojon || chatoboshon || chatobokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chatobothooro || chatobojooro || chatoboshooro || chatobokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
